name: codegen
description: Generate code from natural language using the configured AI provider

prompt.description: Natural language description of the code to generate

language.description: Target programming language (e.g. javascript, python, bash)

framework.description: Framework or library context (e.g. express, react, fastapi)

outputFile.description: Optional file path to write the generated code to

params.prompt: REST endpoint to list users from SQLite
